TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Qyuws, title = Qyuws, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qyuws} }

S.FORM: Qyuws Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Qyuws a niyaro', 88 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 399 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 379 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 20 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal92%, Amis0.5%, Rukai0.5%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *jo~u~uws itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u *jo~u~uws a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*.*%, ro~u~ukai*.*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Qyuws Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Qyuws a niyaro', 88 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 399 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 379 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 20 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal92%, Amis0.5%, Rukai0.5%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *jo~u~uws itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u *jo~u~uws a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*.*%, ro~u~ukai*.*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~u °.
